description: Our friends at PyData NYC have another fantastic event lined up. For details and to RSVP, check the PyData NYC event page: [LLMOps with Hopsworks and Modal Labs](https://www.meetup.com/pydatanyc/events/300430791/) Please check it out while we’re working on lining up new programming for the IBM Meetup Network – in person, virtual, and hybrid. Stay tuned!
